## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content creation process for Sunbit is smooth and efficient, with quick legal approvals](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [GrowthX to build SEO performance dashboard next week; traffic impact expected late May-July](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Sunbit's "State of Dental" report offers valuable data for content creation and link building](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Automation opportunities identified to increase productivity in content publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Progress and Efficiency

  - [7 blog posts completed, 3 more expected by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Legal approving content quickly, enabling rapid publishing](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Content types and personas working well with GrowthX workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Team member creating Sunbit articles during off-hours due to ease of process](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

### SEO Strategy and Performance Expectations

  - [Indexing and keyword impressions to be monitored in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Traffic ramp-up expected late May into June/July](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Projected timeline based on past experience: few hundred clicks (month 1) → 1,000-1,500 (month 2) → 10,000 (month 3) → 25,000 (month 6)](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Tight clustering and existing site authority may accelerate results](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### Sunbit's Site Performance and User Engagement

  - [Recent improvements to shop directory (Google Maps API integration, business info)](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Time on site increased from \~10 seconds to over 1 minute](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [2M unique users last year; projecting 5-10M for current year](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### "State of Dental" Report and Data Utilization

  - [Annual survey of 1,000 dental professionals and 1,000 patients](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [2025 version recently published (currently gated for lead generation)](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Potential to extract data for blog posts and increase keyword density](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Report written by GPT-4 model, taking a week to process survey data](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Content Distribution and Social Media

  - [Plan to create 10 social posts for each of 3 polished blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Will send to Sunbit for approval before scaling up production](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Automation and Productivity

  - [Jason identified need for automation to handle increasing content volume](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Goal: Fully automate review, approval, and publishing process within days](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to publish recently sent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [GrowthX to build Looker Studio dashboard for SEO performance tracking next week](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [David to post new content in Slack for real-time review](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Explore automation opportunities for content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and send social media post samples for approval](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Jason to share "State of Dental" report and survey data with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/AGkQ1vc1NjVvvnqyxKcW6yysyssh7ysk?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
